requirement_topic.en: Utility Grid Connection — 230/400 V, 50 Hz, STELCO and FENAKA Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 公用事业并网——230/400 V、50 Hz、STELCO及FENAKA审批
requirement_topic.zht: 公用事業併網——230/400 V、50 Hz、STELCO及FENAKA審批

summary.en: Maldives uses a 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz electricity supply. EV charger installations must be coordinated with the relevant utility: STELCO for Greater Male service areas and FENAKA for many outer-atoll island grids. Site approval should address service capacity, transformer loading, metering, protection coordination, harmonic current, earthing, cable routing in compact island sites, and commissioning evidence. Because many islands operate as small or isolated grids with solar-plus-storage expansion, charger load management and power-quality review are important project-level requirements even where a single national EVSE rule is not published.
summary.zh: 马尔代夫采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz供电。电动汽车充电桩安装须与相关公用事业单位协调：大马累服务区域通常为STELCO，许多外岛电网为FENAKA。站点审批应覆盖供电容量、变压器负载、计量、保护配合、谐波电流、接地、紧凑岛屿场地的电缆路径，以及调试证据。由于许多岛屿为小型或孤立电网，并正在扩展光伏加储能，充电负荷管理和电能质量审查即使在未发布单一国家EVSE规则时，也属于重要项目级要求。
summary.zht: 馬爾地夫採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz供電。電動汽車充電樁安裝須與相關公用事業單位協調：大馬累服務區域通常為STELCO，許多外島電網為FENAKA。站點審批應覆蓋供電容量、變壓器負載、計量、保護配合、諧波電流、接地、緊湊島嶼場地的電纜路徑，以及調試證據。由於許多島嶼為小型或孤立電網，並正在擴展光伏加儲能，充電負荷管理和電能質量審查即使在未發布單一國家EVSE規則時，也屬於重要項目級要求。

standards_or_laws: Maldives Energy Authority / Ministry of Environment energy-sector oversight
STELCO project connection and commissioning requirements for Greater Male service areas
FENAKA project connection and commissioning requirements for outer-atoll island grids
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Maldives has the same 50 Hz frequency but a different 230/400 V nominal voltage, so China factory settings cannot be treated as automatically voltage-matched.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。马尔代夫频率同为50 Hz，但标称电压为230/400 V，不同于中国，因此不能将中国出厂设置视为自动电压匹配。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。馬爾地夫頻率同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓為230/400 V，不同於中國，因此不能將中國出廠設置視為自動電壓匹配。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger input range, protection thresholds, metering, RCD or residual DC detection, and thermal limits cover 230 V / 400 V at 50 Hz under Maldives utility conditions. For island grids, provide load calculations, harmonic data, load-management settings, single-line diagrams, commissioning procedures, and utility-facing documentation for STELCO or FENAKA. The 50 Hz frequency alignment is helpful, but the China 220/380 V baseline still requires voltage-range and site-protection review.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认充电桩输入范围、保护阈值、计量、RCD或直流剩余电流检测，以及热限制均覆盖马尔代夫公用事业条件下的230 V / 400 V、50 Hz。对于岛屿电网，应提供负荷计算、谐波数据、负荷管理设置、单线图、调试程序，以及面向STELCO或FENAKA的文件。50 Hz频率一致有利，但中国220/380 V基线仍须进行电压范围和现场保护审查。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認充電樁輸入範圍、保護閾值、計量、RCD或直流剩餘電流檢測，以及熱限制均覆蓋馬爾地夫公用事業條件下的230 V / 400 V、50 Hz。對於島嶼電網，應提供負荷計算、諧波數據、負荷管理設置、單線圖、調試程序，以及面向STELCO或FENAKA的文件。50 Hz頻率一致有利，但中國220/380 V基線仍須進行電壓範圍和現場保護審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at project level — grid-connected charger installations require the relevant utility's service-capacity, protection, metering, and commissioning acceptance; confirm whether STELCO or FENAKA controls the site
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance applies domestically and is not a Maldives utility approval substitute; same 50 Hz frequency does not remove the 230/400 V versus 220/380 V voltage review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Maldives-ready charger package needs STELCO or FENAKA site approval evidence, 230/400 V 50 Hz input confirmation, power-quality data, and island-grid load-management documentation. Do not state that Maldives voltage matches China; only the 50 Hz frequency aligns.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向马尔代夫的充电桩资料包须包括STELCO或FENAKA站点审批证据、230/400 V 50 Hz输入确认、电能质量数据及岛屿电网负荷管理文件。不得声称马尔代夫电压与中国匹配；两者仅频率同为50 Hz。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向馬爾地夫的充電樁資料包須包括STELCO或FENAKA站點審批證據、230/400 V 50 Hz輸入確認、電能質量數據及島嶼電網負荷管理文件。不得聲稱馬爾地夫電壓與中國匹配；兩者僅頻率同為50 Hz。
